recommendations.title: Clinical
recommendations.overview: A psychiatrist tries to put her life back together after a violent attack by seeking to repair the life of a new patient, but he has his own terrifying history.

recommendations.title: Delicious
recommendations.overview: During their vacation in the French countryside, a wealthy German family becomes entangled with a young hotel worker harboring sinister intentions.

recommendations.title: You Should Have Left
recommendations.overview: In an effort to repair their relationship, a couple books a vacation in the countryside for themselves and their daughter. What starts as a perfect retreat begins to fall apart as one loses their grip on reality, and a sinister force tries to tear th

recommendations.title: Malicious
recommendations.overview: A young college professor and his pregnant wife unwittingly release a malevolent entity with murderous intentions.

recommendations.title: Superhost
recommendations.overview: Two travel vloggers check into a vacation rental with a host that will do anything for a good review.

recommendations.title: Ghost House
recommendations.overview: A young couple go on an adventurous vacation to Thailand only to find themselves haunted by a malevolent spirit after naively disrespecting a Ghost House.

recommendations.title: The Fury of a Patient Man
recommendations.overview: Quiet Jose woos cafe worker Ana, but she is unaware he has intentions other than the purely romantic.

recommendations.title: In Their Skin
recommendations.overview: A couple and their young son retreat to their woodland vacation home, only to face sinister neighbors who intend to kill them and steal their identities.

recommendations.title: Maneater
recommendations.overview: A group of friends on vacation in a seeming island paradise are stalked by an unrelenting great white after an accident leaves them stranded and left for dead.

recommendations.title: The Backwoods
recommendations.overview: An English couple's holiday in Spain is interrupted when they discover a girl imprisoned in a cabin.
